name: gemma-webgpu-engine
description: Inspectable Gemma 4 E2B inference runtime with owned WebGPU kernels and complete decoding controls.

scripts.test:unit: playwright test tests/sampling.spec.ts tests/qat-linear.spec.ts tests/cached-safetensors.spec.ts tests/gemma-layer-plan.spec.ts tests/gemma-layer-weights.spec.ts tests/gemma-layer-materializer.spec.ts
scripts.benchmark:suite:full: BENCHMARK_SUITE_LIVE=1 BENCHMARK_SUITE_PROFILE=full BENCHMARK_BROWSER_MODE=headless playwright test tests/benchmark-suite.live.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.benchmark:suite:resume: BENCHMARK_SUITE_LIVE=1 BENCHMARK_SUITE_PROFILE=full BENCHMARK_BROWSER_MODE=headless playwright test tests/benchmark-suite.live.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.benchmark:suite:full:headed: BENCHMARK_SUITE_LIVE=1 BENCHMARK_SUITE_PROFILE=full BENCHMARK_BROWSER_MODE=headed playwright test tests/benchmark-suite.live.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
